title: COBOL 001 - Programa básico DISPLAY
description: Exibe mensagem simples e termina de forma explícita. Variante 1.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HELLO001.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           DISPLAY 'OLA DO COBOL 001'.
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 002 - Uso de WORKING-STORAGE
description: Declara campos numéricos e alfanuméricos com edição simples. Variante 2.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. WS002.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-NOME        PIC X(20) VALUE 'USUARIO'.
       01 WS-VALOR       PIC 9(5)V99 VALUE 12345.67.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           DISPLAY 'NOME=' WS-NOME.
           DISPLAY 'VALOR=' WS-VALOR.
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 003 - IF e EVALUATE
description: Compara condições e trata múltiplos casos de forma legível. Variante 3.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IFEV003.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STATUS      PIC X VALUE 'A'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           IF WS-STATUS = 'A'
              DISPLAY 'ATIVO'
           END-IF
           EVALUATE WS-STATUS
              WHEN 'A' DISPLAY 'PROCESSA NORMAL'
              WHEN 'B' DISPLAY 'BLOQUEADO'
              WHEN OTHER DISPLAY 'NAO MAPEADO'
           END-EVALUATE
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 004 - PERFORM VARYING
description: Executa laço controlado por contador numérico. Variante 4.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LOOP004.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I           PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5
              DISPLAY 'ITEM ' WS-I
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 005 - Leitura sequencial
description: Abre arquivo sequencial, lê até fim e trata status. Variante 5.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEQ005.
       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT ARQENT ASSIGN TO 'ARQENT'
               ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL.
       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  ARQENT.
       01  REG-ENT       PIC X(80).
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-EOF        PIC X VALUE 'N'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQENT
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-EOF = 'S'
              READ ARQENT
                 AT END MOVE 'S' TO WS-EOF
                 NOT AT END DISPLAY REG-ENT
              END-READ
           END-PERFORM
           CLOSE ARQENT
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 006 - COMPUTE e arredondamento
description: Calcula valores derivados usando variáveis numéricas. Variante 6.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COMP006.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-QTD         PIC 9(3) VALUE 12.
       01 WS-PRECO       PIC 9(4)V99 VALUE 25.50.
       01 WS-TOTAL       PIC 9(6)V99.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-TOTAL ROUNDED = WS-QTD * WS-PRECO
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL=' WS-TOTAL
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 007 - INSPECT e UNSTRING
description: Manipula texto com contagem, substituição e separação. Variante 7.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STR007.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LINHA       PIC X(30) VALUE 'ABC;DEF;GHI'.
       01 WS-A           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-B           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-C           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-COUNT       PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           INSPECT WS-LINHA TALLYING WS-COUNT FOR ALL ';'
           UNSTRING WS-LINHA DELIMITED BY ';'
               INTO WS-A WS-B WS-C
           END-UNSTRING
           DISPLAY WS-COUNT '|' WS-A '|' WS-B '|' WS-C
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 008 - OCCURS e SEARCH
description: Mostra tabela em memória e busca linear simples. Variante 8.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TAB008.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-IDX         PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 TABELA.
          05 ITEM OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX.
             10 COD      PIC X(3).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE '001' TO COD(1)
           MOVE '002' TO COD(2)
           MOVE '003' TO COD(3)
           SEARCH ITEM
              AT END DISPLAY 'NAO ACHOU'
              WHEN COD(IDX) = '002'
                 DISPLAY 'ACHOU ' COD(IDX)
           END-SEARCH
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 009 - Parágrafos e seções
description: Separa a lógica em blocos reutilizáveis com PERFORM. Variante 9.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MOD009.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-SECTION SECTION.
       INICIO.
           PERFORM 1000-INICIALIZA
           PERFORM 2000-PROCESSA
           GOBACK.
       1000-INICIALIZA.
           DISPLAY 'INICIO'.
       2000-PROCESSA.
           DISPLAY 'PROCESSA'.
       *> Variante com comentário de manutenção

title: COBOL 010 - CALL USING
description: Chama subprograma com passagem de parâmetro. Variante 10.

       PROGRAM-ID. CALL010.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-PAR         PIC X(10) VALUE 'PARAMETRO'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           CALL 'SUBROT' USING WS-PAR
           DISPLAY 'RETORNO=' WS-PAR
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IFEV043.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STATUS      PIC X VALUE 'A'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           IF WS-STATUS = 'A'
              DISPLAY 'ATIVO'
           END-IF
           EVALUATE WS-STATUS
              WHEN 'A' DISPLAY 'PROCESSA NORMAL'
              WHEN 'B' DISPLAY 'BLOQUEADO'
              WHEN OTHER DISPLAY 'NAO MAPEADO'
           END-EVALUATE
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 044 - PERFORM VARYING
description: Executa laço controlado por contador numérico. Variante 44.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5

           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 045 - Leitura sequencial
description: Abre arquivo sequencial, lê até fim e trata status. Variante 45.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  ARQENT.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.

title: COBOL 046 - COMPUTE e arredondamento
description: Calcula valores derivados usando variáveis numéricas. Variante 46.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COMP046.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-QTD         PIC 9(3) VALUE 12.
       01 WS-PRECO       PIC 9(4)V99 VALUE 25.50.
       01 WS-TOTAL       PIC 9(6)V99.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-TOTAL ROUNDED = WS-QTD * WS-PRECO
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL=' WS-TOTAL
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 047 - INSPECT e UNSTRING
description: Manipula texto com contagem, substituição e separação. Variante 47.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STR047.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LINHA       PIC X(30) VALUE 'ABC;DEF;GHI'.
       01 WS-A           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-B           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-C           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-COUNT       PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           INSPECT WS-LINHA TALLYING WS-COUNT FOR ALL ';'
           UNSTRING WS-LINHA DELIMITED BY ';'
               INTO WS-A WS-B WS-C
           END-UNSTRING
           DISPLAY WS-COUNT '|' WS-A '|' WS-B '|' WS-C
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 048 - OCCURS e SEARCH
description: Mostra tabela em memória e busca linear simples. Variante 48.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TAB048.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-IDX         PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 TABELA.
          05 ITEM OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX.
             10 COD      PIC X(3).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE '001' TO COD(1)
           MOVE '002' TO COD(2)
           MOVE '003' TO COD(3)
           SEARCH ITEM
              AT END DISPLAY 'NAO ACHOU'
              WHEN COD(IDX) = '002'
                 DISPLAY 'ACHOU ' COD(IDX)
           END-SEARCH
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 294 - PERFORM VARYING
description: Executa laço controlado por contador numérico. Variante 294.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

              DISPLAY 'ITEM ' WS-I
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 295 - Leitura sequencial
description: Abre arquivo sequencial, lê até fim e trata status. Variante 295.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEQ295.
       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT ARQENT ASSIGN TO 'ARQENT'
               ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL.
       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  ARQENT.
       01  REG-ENT       PIC X(80).
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-EOF        PIC X VALUE 'N'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQENT
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-EOF = 'S'
              READ ARQENT
                 AT END MOVE 'S' TO WS-EOF
                 NOT AT END DISPLAY REG-ENT
              END-READ
           END-PERFORM
           CLOSE ARQENT
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 296 - COMPUTE e arredondamento
description: Calcula valores derivados usando variáveis numéricas. Variante 296.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COMP296.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-QTD         PIC 9(3) VALUE 12.
       01 WS-PRECO       PIC 9(4)V99 VALUE 25.50.
       01 WS-TOTAL       PIC 9(6)V99.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-TOTAL ROUNDED = WS-QTD * WS-PRECO
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL=' WS-TOTAL
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 297 - INSPECT e UNSTRING
description: Manipula texto com contagem, substituição e separação. Variante 297.
code:

       PROGRAM-ID. STR297.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LINHA       PIC X(30) VALUE 'ABC;DEF;GHI'.
       01 WS-A           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-B           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-C           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-COUNT       PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           INSPECT WS-LINHA TALLYING WS-COUNT FOR ALL ';'
           UNSTRING WS-LINHA DELIMITED BY ';'

           END-UNSTRING
           DISPLAY WS-COUNT '|' WS-A '|' WS-B '|' WS-C
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 298 - OCCURS e SEARCH
description: Mostra tabela em memória e busca linear simples. Variante 298.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TAB298.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-IDX         PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 TABELA.
          05 ITEM OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX.
             10 COD      PIC X(3).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE '001' TO COD(1)
           MOVE '002' TO COD(2)
           MOVE '003' TO COD(3)
           SEARCH ITEM
              AT END DISPLAY 'NAO ACHOU'
              WHEN COD(IDX) = '002'
                 DISPLAY 'ACHOU ' COD(IDX)
           END-SEARCH
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 463 - IF e EVALUATE
description: Compara condições e trata múltiplos casos de forma legível. Variante 463.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IFEV463.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STATUS      PIC X VALUE 'A'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           IF WS-STATUS = 'A'
              DISPLAY 'ATIVO'
           END-IF
           EVALUATE WS-STATUS
              WHEN 'A' DISPLAY 'PROCESSA NORMAL'
              WHEN 'B' DISPLAY 'BLOQUEADO'
              WHEN OTHER DISPLAY 'NAO MAPEADO'
           END-EVALUATE
           GOBACK.

description: Executa laço controlado por contador numérico. Variante 464.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I           PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 5
              DISPLAY 'ITEM ' WS-I
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 465 - Leitura sequencial
description: Abre arquivo sequencial, lê até fim e trata status. Variante 465.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEQ465.
       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT ARQENT ASSIGN TO 'ARQENT'
               ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL.
       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  ARQENT.
       01  REG-ENT       PIC X(80).
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-EOF        PIC X VALUE 'N'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQENT
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-EOF = 'S'
              READ ARQENT
                 AT END MOVE 'S' TO WS-EOF
                 NOT AT END DISPLAY REG-ENT
              END-READ
           END-PERFORM
           CLOSE ARQENT
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 466 - COMPUTE e arredondamento
description: Calcula valores derivados usando variáveis numéricas. Variante 466.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COMP466.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-QTD         PIC 9(3) VALUE 12.
       01 WS-PRECO       PIC 9(4)V99 VALUE 25.50.
       01 WS-TOTAL       PIC 9(6)V99.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-TOTAL ROUNDED = WS-QTD * WS-PRECO
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL=' WS-TOTAL
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 467 - INSPECT e UNSTRING
description: Manipula texto com contagem, substituição e separação. Variante 467.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STR467.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LINHA       PIC X(30) VALUE 'ABC;DEF;GHI'.
       01 WS-A           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-B           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-C           PIC X(10).
       01 WS-COUNT       PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           INSPECT WS-LINHA TALLYING WS-COUNT FOR ALL ';'
           UNSTRING WS-LINHA DELIMITED BY ';'
               INTO WS-A WS-B WS-C
           END-UNSTRING
           DISPLAY WS-COUNT '|' WS-A '|' WS-B '|' WS-C
           GOBACK.

title: COBOL 468 - OCCURS e SEARCH
description: Mostra tabela em memória e busca linear simples. Variante 468.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TAB468.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-IDX         PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 TABELA.
          05 ITEM OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX.
             10 COD      PIC X(3).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE '001' TO COD(1)
           MOVE '002' TO COD(2)
           MOVE '003' TO COD(3)
           SEARCH ITEM
              AT END DISPLAY 'NAO ACHOU'
              WHEN COD(IDX) = '002'
                 DISPLAY 'ACHOU ' COD(IDX)
           END-SEARCH
           STOP RUN.

       *> Variante com comentário de manutenção
